name: French Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually stir in the milk and cornstarch mixture until smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract and set aside to cool slightly.
4. Strain the mixture into a clean bowl and let it cool thoroughly.
5. Transfer the base to an ice cream machine and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
6. Makes about 1 quart.
